entries.definition:
b–n–n tip of the finger, the entire finger; arms and legs; to remain in a place; constancy; odour. Of this root, بَنَان banān occurs twice in the Qur’an.
بَنَان banān [coll. n.; sing. بَنَانَة banānatun] 1 fingertips, also said to indicate the entire finger (75:3–4) أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُ بَلَى قَادِرِينَ عَلَى أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُ does man think We cannot collect his bones?, yes, We can, We are able [even] to reconstruct his very fingertips 2 also said to mean arms and legs or limbs in general (in an interpretation of verse 8:12) وَاضْرِبُوا مِنْهُمْ كُلَّ بَنَانٍ and strike off their every limb.
entries.definition_english:
b–n–n tip of the finger, the entire finger; arms and legs; to remain in a place; constancy; odour. Of this root, بَنَان banān occurs twice in the Qur’an.
بَنَان banān [coll. n.; sing. بَنَانَة banānatun] 1 fingertips, also said to indicate the entire finger (75:3–4) أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُ بَلَى قَادِرِينَ عَلَى أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُ does man think We cannot collect his bones?, yes, We can, We are able [even] to reconstruct his very fingertips 2 also said to mean arms and legs or limbs in general (in an interpretation of verse 8:12) وَاضْرِبُوا مِنْهُمْ كُلَّ بَنَانٍ and strike off their every limb.
